personal.name: Derek Yendoh
personal.title: AI/ML Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Designing AI systems for healthcare, education, and emerging digital infrastructure across Africa.
personal.footerBio: AI/ML engineer and entrepreneur from Ghana. HealthTech, EdTech, voice AI, and systems built for real constraints.

about.quote: I build for real constraints, not ideal assumptions.
about.label: BUILDER • ENGINEER • ENTREPRENEUR

sections.title: Who I Am
sections.content: I'm Derek Yendoh, an AI/ML software engineer and early-stage entrepreneur from Ghana focused on practical AI systems for healthcare and education. My work sits at the intersection of software engineering, machine learning, and real-world problem solving across African contexts.

sections.title: What I Build
sections.content: I currently work as an AI/ML Engineer at 4th IR and contribute to open-source AI initiatives with Ghana NLP. Over the past few years, I've built voice agents, RAG systems, backend infrastructure, and intelligent applications using FastAPI, Python, LLMs, and modern AI frameworks.

sections.title: My Approach
sections.content: Beyond engineering, I've spent years experimenting with startup ideas — failing, rebuilding, and learning how difficult it is to turn strong technical ideas into scalable products. That process shaped how I think about execution, ownership, and building for real constraints.

sections.title: Current Focus
sections.content: Currently interested in AI infrastructure, intelligent healthcare systems, AI agents, edge AI, and products that improve access across underserved communities.
